name: Brighthouse Financial Inc. Depositary shares each representing a 1/1000th Interest in a Share of 4.625% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series D
summary: Brighthouse Financial Inc. Depositary shares each representing a 1/1000th Interest in a Share of 4.625% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series D represents ownership in a portion of Brighthouse Financial's preferred stock. The preferred stock pays a fixed dividend but dividends are not guaranteed (non-cumulative). Brighthouse Financial is a major provider of annuity and life insurance products.
